needles (plural)
needled (past tense)
needling (present participle)
needle (exact match)
aneedle (prefix attached)
needlea (suffix attached)
the-needle-pattern (hyphenated)
_needle_ (underscored)
"needle" (quoted)
'needle' (single quoted)
needle's (possessive)
needle, comma after
.needle. dots around
/needle/ slashes
